title: Glycan-Centric Functional Enrichment Analysis
text: glyfun provides functional enrichment analysis glycoproteomics data. provides two sets functions, answering different questions: enrich_xxx(): “functions enriched proteins dysregulated glycosylation?” enrich_gc_xxx(): “functions enriched dyregulated glycan traits?” gc “glycan-centric”, means connecting glycan traits (e.g. core-fucosylation) functional annotations. Representation Analysis (ORA) Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA) supported, common databases including GO, KEGG, Reactome, WikiPathways, (Disease Ontology), NCG (Network Cancer Genes).

what: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
title: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
text: Performs glycan-centric Disease Ontology () -Representation Analysis (ORA). Instead traditional protein-centric enrichment, function links specific glycan traits disease associations. helps answer questions like "diseases enriched proteins specific dysregulated glycan motif?", grouping differential analysis results glycan traits computing disease enrichment trait.

title: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
code: enrich_gc_ora_do(   dea_res,   dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,   dea_log2fc_cutoff = c(-1, 1),   ont = "HDO",   organism = "hsa",   universe = NULL,   p_adj_method = "BH",   p_cutoff = 0.05,   q_cutoff = 0.2,   min_gs_size = 10,   max_gs_size = 500 )

title: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
text: dea_res Differential analysis result. Can one : Result glystats::gly_limma() (two groups), glystats::gly_ttest(), glystats::gly_wilcox(), called glyexp::experiment() "traitproteomics" type. tibble following columns: protein: Uniprot ID proteins trait: glycosylation trait (e.g. "TFc" proportion core-fucosylated glycans) site: glycosylation site. p_val: p-values, preferably adjusted p-values log2fc: log2 fold change dea_p_cutoff P-value cutoff statistical significance. Defaults 0.05. glystats result input, adjusted p-values used. dea_log2fc_cutoff Log2 fold change cutoff statistical significance. length-2 numeric vector, negative positive boundaries, respectively. example, c(-1, 1) means "log2fc < -1 log2fc > 1", c(-Inf, 1) means "log2fc > 1". Defaults c(-1, 1). ont One "HDO" (Human Disease Ontology), "MPO" (Mammalian Phenotype Ontology), "VDO" (Vector Disease Ontology). Passed ont DOSE::enrichDO(). Defaults "HDO". organism "hsa" (Homo sapiens) "mmu" (Mus musculus). Passed organism DOSE::enrichDO(). Defaults "hsa". universe Background genes Uniprot IDs, directly passed universe downstream enrichment function. NULL (default), genes data used. Another common pattern use detected proteins backgroud genes. can use detected_universe() help . p_adj_method P-value adjustment method. One "holm", "hochberg", "hommel", "bonferroni", "BH", "", "fdr", "none". Passed pAdjustMethod downstream enrichment function. Defaults "BH". p_cutoff P-value cutoff filter significant terms. Passed pvalueCutoff downstream enrichment function. Defaults 0.05. q_cutoff Q-value (FDR) cutoff filter significant terms. Passed qvalueCutoff downstream enrichment function. Defaults 0.2. min_gs_size Minimal size gene set analyzing. Gene sets fewer genes threshold excluded. Passed minGSSize downstream enrichment function. Defaults 10. max_gs_size Maximum size gene set analyzing. Gene sets genes threshold excluded. Passed maxGSSize downstream enrichment function. Defaults 500.

title: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
text: traditional glycoproteomics data analysis, usually perform differential expression analysis (DEA) glycoforms, extract proteins dysregulated glycosylation, perform functional enrichment (e.g. GO) proteins. enrich_xxx() functions (e.g. enrich_ora_go()). enrich_gc_xxx() functions differ link specific glycan traits functional annotations. Instead answering question "functions enriched dysregulated glycoproteins?", enrich_gc_xxx() answers questions like “functions enriched proteins dysregulated core-fucosylation?” Higher specificity, deeper insights. focusing distinct glycan motifs, helps pinpoint functional relevance specific glycosylation changes.

title: Glycan-Centric Disease Ontology (DO) Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_do
text: common pattern using function :
code: # 1. Use `glydet` to calculate derived traits or motif quantification. trait_exp <- derive_traits(exp)  # or `quantify_motifs()`  # 2. Perform differential analysis with `glystats`. dea_res <- gly_ttest(trait_exp)  # 3. Use this function. go_res <- enrich_gc_ora_go(dea_res)  # or other `enrich_gc_xxx()` functions

Instead answering question "functions enriched dysregulated glycoproteins?", enrich_gc_xxx() answers questions like “functions enriched proteins dysregulated core-fucosylation?” Higher specificity, deeper insights. focusing distinct glycan motifs, helps pinpoint functional relevance specific glycosylation changes.

what: Glycan-Centric WikiPathways Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_wp
title: Glycan-Centric WikiPathways Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_wp
text: Performs glycan-centric WikiPathways -Representation Analysis (ORA). Instead traditional protein-centric enrichment, function links specific glycan traits biological pathways. helps answer questions like "WikiPathways enriched proteins specific dysregulated glycan motif?", grouping differential analysis results glycan traits computing pathway enrichment trait.

title: Glycan-Centric WikiPathways Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_wp
code: enrich_gc_ora_wp(   dea_res,   dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,   dea_log2fc_cutoff = c(-1, 1),   organism = "Homo sapiens",   universe = NULL,   p_adj_method = "BH",   p_cutoff = 0.05,   q_cutoff = 0.2,   min_gs_size = 10,   max_gs_size = 500 )

title: Glycan-Centric WikiPathways Over Representation Analysis — enrich_gc_ora_wp
text: dea_res Differential analysis result. Can one : Result glystats::gly_limma() (two groups), glystats::gly_ttest(), glystats::gly_wilcox(), called glyexp::experiment() "traitproteomics" type. tibble following columns: protein: Uniprot ID proteins trait: glycosylation trait (e.g. "TFc" proportion core-fucosylated glycans) site: glycosylation site. p_val: p-values, preferably adjusted p-values log2fc: log2 fold change dea_p_cutoff P-value cutoff statistical significance. Another common pattern use detected proteins backgroud genes. can use detected_universe() help . p_adj_method P-value adjustment method. Passed pvalueCutoff downstream enrichment function. Defaults 0.05. q_cutoff Q-value (FDR) cutoff filter significant terms. Passed qvalueCutoff downstream enrichment function. Defaults 0.2. min_gs_size Minimal size gene set analyzing. Gene sets fewer genes threshold excluded. Passed minGSSize downstream enrichment function. Defaults 10. max_gs_size Maximum size gene set analyzing. Gene sets genes threshold excluded. Passed maxGSSize downstream enrichment function. Defaults 500.

what: glyfun: Glycan-Centric Functional Enrichment Analysis — glyfun-package
title: glyfun: Glycan-Centric Functional Enrichment Analysis — glyfun-package
text: Provides functional enrichment analysis glycoproteomics data, including protein-centric glycan-centric approaches. 'enrich_xxx()' functions answer "functions enriched proteins dysregulated glycosylation?" (traditional protein-level enrichment), 'enrich_gc_xxx()' functions answer "functions enriched dysregulated glycan traits?" (glycan-centric, linking glycan traits like core-fucosylation functional annotations). Supports Representation Analysis (ORA) Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA) common databases including GO, KEGG, Reactome, WikiPathways, (Disease Ontology), NCG (Network Cancer Genes). Integrates seamlessly 'glydet' (site-specific derived traits) 'glystats' (differential expression analysis).

title: glyfun: Glycan-Centric Functional Enrichment Analysis — glyfun-package
